---
title: RefApp
description: two SvelteWidgets sharing a **windows.SvelteStore**
format: html
filters:
  - quarto-svelte
quarto-svelte:
  use:
    - ../components/RefWidget.svelte
    - ../components/RefData.svelte
---

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
myAccuWidget = html`<my-refwidget></my-refwidget>`
myAccuData = html`<my-refdata></my-refdata>`
```
